page_content:
Formerly: ENCH454.

CHBE455 Model Predictive Control (3 Credits)

Empirical model identification from process data. Step and impulse response models. Linearization of nonlinear first principles models. Single variable Model Predictive Control. Robustness with respect

to modeling error. MPC based tuning of PID controllers. Feedforward control. Multi-input multi-output processes. Multi-loop decentralized control. Centralized multivariable Model Predictive Control via on-line optimization.

Credit Only Granted for. CHBE455 or ENCH455.
